title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in and password reset is not working.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa but the payment keeps failing.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer updated billing address but the old one still appears.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after opening on Android device.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested refund two weeks ago but has not received it.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer not receiving OTP for 2FA login.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer gets upload error when changing profile picture.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer cannot enable auto-renewal for their subscription.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed order but didn't receive confirmation email.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: Customer reports slow loading times on the dashboard.

title: Error While Updating Password
description: Customer receives server error when updating password.

title: Notification Emails Not Received
description: Customer stopped receiving notification emails from the system.

title: Account Locked After Multiple Attempts
description: Customer account locked after several failed login attempts.

title: Feature Request - Dark Mode
description: Customer requested dark mode for better night usage.
